description: Rewrite block string parser: direct string processing instead of sub-lexer + Vec<Vec<Token>>
Replace VecDeque with inline 2-element buffer - regression (~2743 vs 2672)
Optimize next_if_* methods: peek+consume in single buffer operation instead of peek then next
Add Copy to DepthLimiter + preallocate Vec capacity in DefinitionDocument

name: Optimizing bluejay-parser executable document parsing (runtime hot path)

description: Baseline: new exec_µs metric with large_executable.graphql (912 lines, ExecutableDocument::parse)
Field: consume-then-check for alias instead of peek(1), avoids buffering 2 tokens
Compact Span: u32 start+len (8 bytes) instead of Range<usize> (16 bytes), add Copy
